title: ononis natrix subsp. arenaria
intro: Ononis natrix subsp. arenaria, also known as Sand Bur Clover, is a plant species belonging to the legume family that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Sand Bur Clover include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia due to its sedative properties, as well as its ability to support cardiovascular health by lowering blood pressure. The herbal preparations of Sand Bur Clover can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
